creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Building latest port of VLC fails with default config.

PORTNAME=       vlc
DISTVERSION=    2.0.3
PORTREVISION=   3
PORTEPOCH=      3

How-To-Repeat: hexagon# cd /usr/ports/multimedia/vlc/
hexagon# make
